Title: Printable single-task sheet
Intro: This worksheet uses the same generalized worksheet-response block for a graph task without a work table.
PrintHint: Use the browser print dialog for a PDF export.

Sections.Title: Task
Sections.Intro: Determine a minimum spanning tree for the weighted graph and list the selected edges in the answer area.

Blocks.Text: This second complex example reuses the same block type as the shortest-path worksheet, but without a response table.

Blocks.Title: Minimum spanning tree
Blocks.Intro: Use the graph as the basis for Prim or Kruskal and record the chosen edges in the answer area.

Figure.AltText: Weighted graph for a minimum-spanning-tree worksheet
